query: decode this code combination 01-520-7400-0000 into readable account segments
expected_behavior: Loads oracle-fusion-ledger-coa (KEYSTONE) with oracle-fusion-overview as parent
Resolves the CCID via v_code_combination / decode_ccid_segments and the flexfield value sets, not a hand-written split
States that which segment means company / cost center / natural account is per-tenant config and resolves it via the segment->meaning map in the workspace glossary
anti_behavior: Does NOT assume a fixed segment-position-to-meaning mapping
Does NOT treat CODE_COMBINATION_ID as a readable string
